name: UPS System
descs:
Turn End: If at less than 3 [Charge] Count, gain +3 [Charge] Count next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at 3+ [Charge] Count, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at less than 4 [Charge] Count, gain +3 [Charge] Count next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at 4+ [Charge] Count, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at less than 5 [Charge] Count, gain +4 [Charge] Count next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at 5+ [Charge] Count, gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')
